---
title: "Checking compatibility of root & soil data files"
author: "Adrianne Seiden"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 3
    theme: darkly
    highlight: zenburn
    code_folding: hide
knit: (function(inputFile, encoding) {
    rmarkdown::render(inputFile, encoding = encoding,
                     output_dir = "../adrianne-code/") })
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

# Set CRAN mirror
options(repos = c(CRAN = "https://cloud.r-project.org/"))

# Install and load required packages for integration if needed
required_packages <- c("pracma", "nc","ggplot2","ggridges","readr","stringr","viridis","dplyr","cowplot","ggsignif","tidyr","rmarkdown","knitr","grid")
for (pkg in required_packages) {
  if (!require(pkg, character.only = TRUE, quietly = TRUE)) {
    cat("Installing package:", pkg, "\n")
    install.packages(pkg)
    library(pkg, character.only = TRUE)
  }
}

# Source centralized theme and color configuration
source(file.path(dirname(knitr::current_input()), "config/theme_colors_config.R"))
# # Ensure theme is set and variables are initialized
# # theme_set(theme_dark_custom())
timepoint_colors <- c("#50478A", "#3D6988", "#3D8770", "#75873D", "#876B3D")

#set labels for figures
crop_labels <- c(
    noPlant = "No Plant",
    wheat   = "Wheat",
    rice    = "Rice",
    soy     = "Soy"
)

# Set Box path
# I use the BOX_BASE environment variable to define the base path for Box files. Make sure to set this variable in your system environment before running the code, or use a direct path if you are not using Box.
box_base <- Sys.getenv("BOX_BASE") # Delete if not using Box
if (box_base == "") stop("BOX_BASE environment variable is not set!") # Delete if not using Box

# Set path to outputs folder
outputs_folder <- file.path(box_base, "Salk Institute Project/AKS Salk files/Adrianne_FTIRdata/integrated_analysis_outputs")    # path to save outputs

# Create output directory if it doesn't exist
if (!dir.exists(outputs_folder)) {
  dir.create(outputs_folder, recursive = TRUE)
}

# Helper function to find the most recent integration data file
find_most_recent_int_file <- function(data_dir) {
  pattern <- "integrated_peak_data_.*\\.csv$"
  files <- list.files(data_dir, pattern = pattern, full.names = TRUE)
  
  if (length(files) == 0) {
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Extract dates from filenames and find the most recent
  dates <- stringr::str_extract(basename(files), "\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}")
  most_recent_idx <- which.max(as.Date(dates))
  
  cat("Found", length(files), "processed integration files\n")
  cat("Using most recent file:", basename(files[most_recent_idx]), "\n")
  
  return(files[most_recent_idx])
}
# Helper function to find the most recent processed integration data file
find_most_recent_processed_file <- function(data_dir) {
  pattern <- "processed_int_data_.*\\.csv$"
  files <- list.files(data_dir, pattern = pattern, full.names = TRUE)
  
  if (length(files) == 0) {
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Extract dates from filenames and find the most recent
  dates <- stringr::str_extract(basename(files), "\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}")
  most_recent_idx <- which.max(as.Date(dates))
  
  cat("Found", length(files), "processed integration files\n")
  cat("Using most recent file:", basename(files[most_recent_idx]), "\n")
  
  return(files[most_recent_idx])
}

```


# Investigate existing root data files
```{r root-data-structures}
dpt_root_data <- read_csv(file.path(outputs_folder, "dpt_data_normalized_roots.csv"))
print("DPT data structure:")
str(dpt_root_data)
print("DPT data summary:")
summary(dpt_root_data)

integrated_peak_data_file <- find_most_recent_int_file(outputs_folder)
integrated_peak_data <- read_csv(integrated_peak_data_file)
print("Integrated peak data structure:")
str(integrated_peak_data)
print("Integrated peak data summary:")
summary(integrated_peak_data)

processed_int_data_file <- find_most_recent_processed_file(outputs_folder)
processed_int_data <- read_csv(processed_int_data_file)
print("Processed integration data structure:")
str(processed_int_data)
print("Processed integration data summary:")
summary(processed_int_data)
```

# Investigate existing soil data files
```{r soil-data-structures}
camryn_outputs <- file.path(box_base, "Salk Institute Project/AKS Salk files/Camryn_DRIFTSdata/code_outputs")

dpt_soil_data <- read_csv(file.path(camryn_outputs, "dpt_data_normalized.csv"))
print("DPT soil data structure:") 
str(dpt_soil_data)
print("DPT soil data summary:")
summary(dpt_soil_data)

processed_int_soil_data_file <- find_most_recent_processed_file(camryn_outputs)
# print("Most recent processed integration soil data file:", processed_int_soil_data_file)
processed_int_soil_data <- read_csv(processed_int_soil_data_file)
print("Processed integration soil data structure:")
str(processed_int_soil_data)
print("Processed integration soil data summary:")
summary(processed_int_soil_data)
```

# Check compatibility of root and soil data files
```{r check-compatibility}
# Check if the column names of the root and soil data files match
# dpt_data files
print("Checking compatibility of DPT data files...")
dpt_root_columns <- colnames(dpt_root_data)
dpt_soil_columns <- colnames(dpt_soil_data)
if (length(dpt_root_columns) != length(dpt_soil_columns)) {
  cat("Incompatible data files: different number of columns\n")
} else {
  if (all(dpt_root_columns == dpt_soil_columns)) {
    cat("DPT data files are compatible: column names match\n")
  } else {
    cat("DPT data files are incompatible: column names do not match\n")
  }
}


# processed_int_data files
print("Checking compatibility of processed integration data files...")
processed_root_columns <- colnames(processed_int_data)
processed_soil_columns <- colnames(processed_int_soil_data)

if (length(processed_root_columns) != length(processed_soil_columns)) {
  cat("Incompatible data files: different number of columns\n")
} else {
  if (all(processed_root_columns == processed_soil_columns)) {
    cat("Processed integration data files are compatible: column names match\n")
  } else {
    cat("Processed integration data files are incompatible: column names do not match\n")
  }
}
```
